user.description: For a locally deployed add-on use http://local-moonlight-voice:8031. For another repository, use its generated add-on hostname. Set the add-on TTS mode to Home Assistant TTS first.

error.home_assistant_mode_required: Set the add-on TTS mode to Home Assistant TTS and restart the add-on.
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
